title: Valerian
summary: A root traditionally used for settled evenings and calmer night rest.
traditional_use: Valerian has been used for generations in quiet evening preparations. Traditionally it is taken when a person wants a stronger, earthy herb for winding down rather than stimulation.

method_steps.title: Grind
method_steps.text: Lightly bruise the root to expose the aroma before steeping.

method_steps.title: Steep
method_steps.text: Infuse in hot water for 10 to 15 minutes, covered.

method_steps.title: Use at night
method_steps.text: Drink in the evening and keep the rest of the routine calm and simple.

dosage_note: Traditional range: modest evening servings only.

components.prep_notes: Lightly bruise the root before steeping.
